text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Phew! That's my extra sprint done!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hm? Over there—could that be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Great work, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Kita. I didn't realize you were still here as
well.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I just got in an extra sprint, and now I'm
about to head outside!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is that so? You're working very hard.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's because I want to be just like Teio! And all I
can do right now is put in my best effort!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll let you get back to it. Later!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait a moment!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Psshhh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Your legs are beautiful. Those are the legs of an
exceptional runner.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much! Um, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I expect those legs are the very reason you
fail to realize you're overworking yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There, I've finished with the cooling spray on your
legs. Make sure to massage them thoroughly in
the future.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: R-right. But why are you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Because I know very well how it feels to want to
catch up to Teio.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, you can't allow yourself to become so
fixated on her that you miss the changes
occurring within you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's both try to be more vigilant. Now, if you'll
excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: McQueen really is amazing...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She's Teio's rival after all, though. It's no wonder
she's so impressive! All right! I need to work hard
too!
